journal_entry.description: Office relocation services provided to customer, payment due in 10 days
journal_entry.rationale: Atlas Van Lines provided relocation services and revenue is recognized upon completion of service under IFRS 15. The debit tuple (1,0,0,0,0,0) indicates one asset increase line - Accounts Receivable, as payment is due in 10 days. The credit tuple (0,0,1,0,0,0) indicates one revenue increase line. No tax information was provided in the lookup results, so no sales tax lines are included. The entry records the earned revenue and the corresponding receivable.

output.reason: Atlas Van Lines provided office relocation services to a customer. This creates revenue (service revenue) which is a revenue increase. Since payment is due in 10 days (accounts receivable on debit side), the credit side records the revenue earned from providing the service.
